question.text: As per Regulation 9A(6) of SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015, every listed company shall have:

answer.text: A dedicated insider trading investigation team
A separate audit committee for insider trading compliance
A whistle-blower policy to enable employees to report instances of leaks of UPSI
A SEBI-appointed compliance officer for insider trading matters

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Regulation 9A(6) mandates that listed companies shall have a whistle-blower policy and make employees aware of it to enable them to report instances of leaks of UPSI. **The Trap:** While investigation and audit mechanisms exist, the specific requirement under Regulation 9A(6) is for a whistle-blower policy. **Cross-Exam Context:** NISM Series III-B also covers whistle-blower requirements for listed entities. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The whistle-blower policy complements the SEBI Informant mechanism under Regulation 7A-7K but operates at the company level.
